
```{r}
# =======================
# PACKAGES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(broom)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/Red_dot.csv"
out_dir <- "output/red_dot_necrosis_24h"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# Required columns:
#   Draxin
#   Percentage
#   Experiment
#   Hours   (or Hour / Hr)
# =======================
df_raw <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Allow either Hr, Hour, or Hours
if ("Hr" %in% names(df_raw) && !("Hours" %in% names(df_raw))) {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Hours = Hr)
}
if ("Hour" %in% names(df_raw) && !("Hours" %in% names(df_raw))) {
  df_raw <- df_raw %>% rename(Hours = Hour)
}

required_cols <- c("Draxin", "Percentage", "Experiment", "Hours")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df_raw))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

# =======================
# CLEAN DATA
# =======================
draxin_order <- c("0", "0.6", "1.1", "2.2", "4.4", "8.8", "17.5", "35", "70", "140")

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Draxin = str_trim(as.character(Draxin)),
    Hours = as.numeric(Hours),
    Percentage = as.numeric(Percentage)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Experiment),
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Hours),
    !is.na(Percentage)
  )

draxin_order_present <- draxin_order[draxin_order %in% unique(df$Draxin)]
if (length(draxin_order_present) == 0) {
  draxin_order_present <- sort(unique(df$Draxin))
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin = factor(Draxin, levels = draxin_order_present)
  )

if (!("0" %in% levels(df$Draxin))) {
  stop("Control level '0' was not found in Draxin column.")
}
```

```{r}
# =======================
# BASIC QC
# =======================
qc_table <- data.frame(
  metric = c(
    "n_rows",
    "n_experiments",
    "experiments",
    "n_draxin_levels",
    "draxin_levels",
    "hours"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(df),
    dplyr::n_distinct(df$Experiment),
    paste(levels(df$Experiment), collapse = ", "),
    dplyr::n_distinct(df$Draxin),
    paste(levels(df$Draxin), collapse = ", "),
    paste(sort(unique(df$Hours)), collapse = ", ")
  )
)

write.csv(
  qc_table,
  file.path(out_dir, "qc_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

dup_check <- df %>%
  count(Experiment, Draxin, Hours) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

write.csv(
  dup_check,
  file.path(out_dir, "duplicate_entries_check.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# FULL RAW TIME COURSE SUMMARY
# =======================
df_time_plot <- df %>%
  group_by(Draxin, Hours) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_percentage = mean(Percentage, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_percentage = sd(Percentage, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_percentage = sd_percentage / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_time_plot,
  file.path(out_dir, "timecourse_raw_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# PLOT: FULL RAW TIME COURSE
# =======================
p_time <- ggplot(df_time_plot, aes(x = Hours, y = mean_percentage, color = Draxin, group = Draxin)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_percentage - sem_percentage,
        ymax = mean_percentage + sem_percentage),
    width = 3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Necrotic cells over time",
    x = "Time (h)",
    y = "% red_dot positive cells",
    color = "Draxin (nM)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_timecourse_raw_mean_sem.png"),
  plot = p_time,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_timecourse_raw_mean_sem.pdf"),
  plot = p_time,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# 24 H DATASET
# =======================
df_24 <- df %>%
  filter(Hours == 24)

write.csv(
  df_24,
  file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_raw_values.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

df_24_summary <- df_24 %>%
  group_by(Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_percentage = mean(Percentage, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_percentage = sd(Percentage, na.rm = TRUE),
    sem_percentage = sd_percentage / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(
  df_24_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_summary.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

# =======================
# PLOT: 24 H RAW VALUES
# all points + mean ± SEM
# =======================
p_24 <- ggplot(df_24, aes(x = Draxin, y = Percentage)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0, size = 2.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_24_summary,
    aes(x = Draxin, y = mean_percentage),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_24_summary,
    aes(
      x = Draxin,
      ymin = mean_percentage - sem_percentage,
      ymax = mean_percentage + sem_percentage
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Necrotic cells at 24 h",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "% red_dot positive cells"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_raw_points_mean_sem.png"),
  plot = p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_raw_points_mean_sem.pdf"),
  plot = p_24,
  width = 8,
  height = 5
)
```

```{r}
# =======================
# 24 H STATS
# mixed model if >= 2 experiments,
# otherwise linear model
# =======================
if (nrow(df_24) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(df_24$Draxin) >= 2) {
  
  if (dplyr::n_distinct(df_24$Experiment) >= 2) {
    m_24 <- lmer(Percentage ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df_24)
    model_type <- "lmer"
  } else {
    m_24 <- lm(Percentage ~ Draxin, data = df_24)
    model_type <- "lm"
  }
  
  write.csv(
    data.frame(model_used = model_type),
    file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_model_type.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  anova_24 <- anova(m_24)
  emm_24 <- emmeans(m_24, ~ Draxin)
  
  posthoc_24 <- contrast(
    emm_24,
    method = "trt.vs.ctrl",
    ref = which(levels(df_24$Draxin) == "0"),
    adjust = "dunnett"
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(anova_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_anova.csv"),
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(emm_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_emmeans.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(
    as.data.frame(posthoc_24),
    file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_vs_ctrl_dunnett.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  # add significance labels
  sig_24 <- as.data.frame(posthoc_24) %>%
    mutate(
      contrast = as.character(contrast),
      Draxin_test = str_trim(str_remove(contrast, "\\s*-\\s*0$")),
      p_label = case_when(
        p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    )
  
  write.csv(
    sig_24,
    file.path(out_dir, "red_dot_24h_significance_labels.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
} else {
  message("Skipping 24 h stats: not enough data.")
}

cat("Done.\n")
```
